title: xerochrysum hispidum
intro: Xerochrysum hispidum, also known as the yellow button or strawflower, is a flowering plant species native to Australia. Its medicinal properties have been utilized to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, anxiety, and insomnia, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and volatile oils. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Xerochrysum hispidum can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used in traditional medicine and herbalism.
